folderRule: Only approved trusted source files belong in this folder.
allowedSourceTypes: User-uploaded seed packet information for the user's specific plant or variety
blockedSourceTypes: Product marketing pages unless the question is specifically about that product label

sources.title: USDA Plant Hardiness Zone Map
sources.notes: Use for USDA hardiness zone estimates. Hardiness zone does not replace local frost-date guidance.

sources.title: Local university extension guidance
sources.notes: Use the extension guidance closest to the user's ZIP code or region whenever possible.

sources.title: User seed packet details
sources.notes: Use only for the specific plant or variety the user uploaded. If the image or text is unclear, ask the user to confirm.
